title: Incorrectly Managed Heap Size in Min Priority Queue

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Input will consist of two lines. The first line will contain the size of the array (n). The second line will contain n space-separated integers (the elements of the array).
statement.outputFormat: Output should be a single line containing the minimum value that can be reached by making at most one heapify operation on the input array.
statement.notes: Time and space complexity should be O(n log n) and O(n) respectively
